---
title: "About Me"
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: LIN-166.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: X / twitter 
      href: https://x.com/carlottaang76
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/carlotta-angiolillo-88a711245/
---

Hi! My name is Carlotta Angiolillo, and I’m a junior at Northwestern University studying journalism and data science.

This summer, I'm joining The Columbia Missourian as a reporting intern for a few months. I'm looking for my next opportunity in journalism after that.

Outside of journalism, I’m usually at a local coffee shop, learning new guitar chords or catching up on the latest episode of Abbott Elementary.

You can reach me at lottangiol\@gmail.com or 832-728-7576.
